title: Waterfall-Pool Villa in Lombok
blurb: An organic, flowing villa named for the Sasak word for waterfall — a signature waterfall pool spilling beside the terrace, two infinity pools, and sweeping views over Lombok's dramatic south coast.
detail:
Inspired by the Sasak word for waterfall, this villa channels the calming movement of water — delicate silhouettes and the open horizon of Lombok overlooking the Indian Ocean. Set across four separate, elegantly appointed bedrooms, each a private space, it is ideal for families or groups of friends seeking a balance between connection and calm.

The heart of the home is its signature waterfall pool, a striking design element that flows beside the terrace and sets a soothing soundtrack from morning to sunset. From here you take in sweeping ocean views and the golden glow of Lombok's dramatic south-coast scenery, with two infinity pools and shallow kids' sections across 167 m² of water.

Designed with silhouetted roofs, rich wood panels and selected natural stone, the villa blends seamlessly into its surroundings — an organic aesthetic creating a warm, earthy atmosphere that feels both elevated and deeply grounded. Generous outdoor lounges and terraces are placed throughout, inviting social moments and quiet reflection in equal measure.
